verses.1: Blessed is the man who does not walk in the counsel of the wicked, or set foot on the path of sinners, or sit in the seat of mockers.
verses.2: But his delight is in the Law of the LORD, and on His law he meditates day and night.
verses.3: He is like a tree planted by streams of water, yielding its fruit in season, whose leaf does not wither, and who prospers in all he does.
verses.4: Not so the wicked! For they are like chaff driven off by the wind.
verses.5: Therefore the wicked will not stand in the judgment, nor sinners in the assembly of the righteous.
verses.6: For the LORD guards the path of the righteous, but the way of the wicked will perish.

metadata.source: Derived from the Berean Standard Bible (BSB). Missing verses restored from the Textus Receptus tradition for completeness.
